visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with two women in a split-screen montage. On the left side, a woman with long dark hair and a black top smiles broadly. On the right, she is shown laughing with another woman wearing a blue beret against a vintage floral wallpaper background. High-contrast white and yellow text overlays appear prominently at the center of the frame. (2) The scene transitions to the two women sitting at a grey marble table in an indoor living room setting. The woman on the left wears a black top with shoulder cutouts, while the woman on the right wears a patterned black and white bucket hat and a purple ruffled top. They gesture frequently with their hands and maintain direct eye contact with the camera. (3) The woman in the bucket hat holds up a white teacup with a cartoon bear design in the foam, then swaps it for a pink and white checkered Hydro Flask water bottle. The background features light-colored walls and a wooden shelf populated with several plush toys and a yellow cartoon character lamp under bright, even indoor lighting. (4) Both women present three distinct boxes of m2 collagen drinks in red, purple, and pink packaging. They point to the boxes on the table and hold up individual packets for the viewer to see. The framing is a medium shot, capturing their upper bodies and the items on the table clearly. (5) A close-up shot focuses on the red box and several matching packets laid out on a wooden surface. A hand pours a dark red liquid from one of the packets into a tall, narrow glass. The women reappear in the next shot, smiling and holding the glass while gesturing excitedly towards the camera. (6) The focus shifts to the purple 'Night' version of the product. Purple packets are displayed before the camera, and the liquid is poured into a glass in a similar close-up fashion. The women continue to speak and gesture towards their faces, indicating the product's effect on their skin while holding the purple sachets. (7) Finally, they introduce the pink 'Bright' version of the drink. Pink packets are shown on the table alongside the box. The video concludes with the two women holding all three boxes and several packets, waving and making 'V' hand signs towards the lens in a high-energy, cheerful manner.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 為什麼年齡增加的你們. [Variety]: 2023 VS 2025. 越老越漂亮? 反而比三年前的狀態更好了?. (2) [Subtitle]: 今年參加營養師課程後 發現吃進身體裏的東西真的很重要 人如其食! 每天吃的東西 都會反應在我們的臉和身體 以前一天一杯手搖杯 都不算多 現在每天最少要喝 三千毫升的水才夠 但是喝水還不夠 自從我們開始固定喝 狀態真的不一樣 以前覺得膠原飲 只是保養品的延伸 現在才知道 真的能吸收的膠原 才是關鍵 所以我們都選擇這個. (3) [Slogan]: m2美度 超能膠原飲. [Variety]: 真的能吸收的膠原 才是關鍵. (4) [Subtitle]: 紅色超能膠原飲 每天早上空腹喝一包 一包含6000mg 黃金比例膠原蛋白 喝起來酸酸甜甜的 紅石榴 完全沒有以前吃過 其他的膠原產品的可怕腥味 像果汁一樣 還有晚上就喝這款 紫色晚安膠原飲 除了經典韓國 雙胜肽膠原蛋白 配方 還搭配GABA等成分 洗澡前喝一包 身體內外都有 睡前儀式感 告訴自己的身體是時候 好好休息補充睡眠和營養 不論喝紅的或是紫的 我們都會先喝一包 粉色水光膠原飲 有點類似保養前 要先擦化妝水的概念 先幫皮膚補水 這樣讓後續的膠原 更好吸收 裡面有神經醯胺 韓國玻尿酸 能讓整個人透透亮亮的 獨立包裝 方便飲用 滿滿膠原力 讓你漂亮又美麗. (5) [Slogan]: 一包含6000mg 黃金比例膠原蛋白. 紫色晚安膠原飲. 雙胜肽膠原蛋白 還搭配GABA等成分. 睡前儀式感. 粉色水光膠原飲. 更好吸收. 讓你漂亮又美麗.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 female main creators interacting in an indoor setting.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women; one with long black hair in a black cutout top, the other with shorter hair wearing a patterned bucket hat and purple ruffled blouse.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern indoor living room featuring a grey marble table, light grey walls, and a wooden shelf with plush toys and character-themed decorative lamps.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio opens with a high-energy pop BGM featuring a steady electronic beat and bright synthesized textures. A female voice with a high pitch and excited tone asks an introductory question. The speech is rapid and enthusiastic, setting a positive and energetic emotional valence for the video. (2) Two female voices engage in a fast-paced conversation, alternating clearly with moderate pitch variability. The BGM remains constant as a rhythmic backing track. There are very brief pauses between sentences to maintain the fast tempo. No background noise is present, suggesting a clean studio or indoor recording. (3) As the speakers describe their daily habits, their vocal intensity remains high and friendly. The music maintains its steady 124 BPM rhythm. A subtle foley sound of a liquid splash is heard during a transition, marking the start of the product demonstration. The acoustics are clear and well-balanced. (4) During the detailed breakdown of the red, purple, and pink products, the narration is highly professional yet animated. Both voices are well-enunciated with a high signal-to-noise ratio. The background music continues without interruption, creating a cheerful atmosphere that complements the informative speech content. (5) The final segment features both women speaking in quick succession, concluding the promotion. The music volume remains steady until a hard cut at the very end. The overall audio design is dense with information, following a typical social-media-friendly editing style with minimal environmental noise interference.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Educational Context -> Categorized Showcase -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote m2's line of collagen supplements by presenting them as a solution for maintaining a youthful appearance despite increasing age. It uses a relatable testimonial format, detailing how the creators' habits have changed and how each specific product color (Red, Purple, Pink) addresses different beauty needs.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product boxes, narration of specific health benefits, on-screen brand naming, and demonstration of product consumption.

high_inference.freeDescribe: This is a high-energy social media advertisement using a duo-host format to drive engagement and brand trust within the skincare and wellness niche.
